arts.ttl: 'The best' - the words both Portsmouth boss and the Fratton faithful will want to hear as free transfer arrival makes fitness admission ahead of Leeds and Plymouth games
arts.sum: Alexander Milosevic has reassured the Fratton faithful about his fitness levels.

arts.ttl: Leeds United have brutal Illan Meslier decision to make in 2025
arts.sum: Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier has come in for a lot of criticism this season, but is reportedly aiming to stay as the club’s number one next season. There’s no way of knowing, but these hypotheticals are raised due to the inconsistent performances of the man in Leeds’ goal right now, Illan Meslier.

arts.ttl: How today's results at the bottom of Championship impact Portsmouth ahead of their crunch game against Leeds United
arts.sum: The gap between Pompey and the Championship’s relegation zone has been cut to seven points after today’s latest round of league games.

arts.ttl: Sheff Utd move level with leaders Leeds after beating Preston
arts.sum: Sheffield United continued their promotion push with a 1-0 victory over Preston at Bramall Lane.

arts.ttl: Leeds eyeing up a move for 22-year-old Spanish defender
arts.sum: Leeds United are looking to improve their defensive unit at the end of the season and they have identified the Wolves defender Hugo Bueno as a target. According to a report from TEAMtalk, they are keen on the 22-year-old Spanish under-21 international who has done quite well for Feyenoord this season. The 22-year-old joined the […] The post Leeds eyeing up a move for 22-year-old Spanish defender appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: The 'living legend' status new Portsmouth signing Alexander Milosevic leaves behind - plus his first words as a Fratton Park player
arts.sum: New Pompey signing Alexander Milosevic left fans at his former club heartbroken and angry when it was announced in November that he would be leaving the Stockholm side.

arts.ttl: Championship boss wowed by Leeds United loanee and drops fresh transfer hint
arts.sum: It remains unclear if City will look to sign Gelhardt on a permanent basis in the summer. Gelhardt has operated out wide and in the No 10 position in City head coach Ruben Selles' fluid formation.

arts.ttl: After Kristensen sale, only Harrison has loan clause at Leeds
arts.sum: Leeds United have agreed to sell right-back Rasmus Kristensen on a permanent deal, and will now be looking to find a suitor for Jack Harrison too. Jack Harrison only loan clause player left on the books at Leeds

arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle dealt hammer blow ahead of crucial Championship survival battles against Sheffield Wednesday, Portsmouth and Derby
arts.sum: Pompey rivals Plymouth Argyle have been dealt a telling blow heading into what can be described as a defining week in their season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United can rub salt in Sheffield United wounds after transfer 'regret'
arts.sum: When quizzed on whether Sheffield United will regret letting allowing Bogle to join Leeds, former Aston Villa midfielder Lee Hendrie told Football League World : "Yeah, I certainly think so. "I think they [Sheffield United] will be looking back at that and feeling that they had a potentially very good player on their hands.
